goal: Add a single-line comment to the top of README.md that says: gorechera orchestrator
summary: Prepend a single line "<!-- gorechera orchestrator -->" (HTML comment, the standard comment syntax for Markdown) to the top of README.md in the workspace directory. This is a trivial file edit requiring one step.
product_scope: Prepend a comment line to README.md
non_goals: Change README.md content beyond adding the comment line
proposed_steps: Read current README.md to capture existing content
Prepend the line '<!-- gorechera orchestrator -->' as the first line of README.md
Verify the first line of README.md matches the expected comment
success_signals: First line of README.md reads <!-- gorechera orchestrator -->
File line count increased by exactly 1 compared to original

verification_contract.goal: Verify README.md has the comment line prepended correctly
required_checks: First line of README.md is exactly: <!-- gorechera orchestrator -->
Original content of README.md is fully preserved after the first line
disallowed_actions: Modifying any file other than README.md
Deleting or reordering existing README.md content
